name: sekant-intercept-js
description: Context-Aware YARA Runtime Detection for JavaScript Environments

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:matching && npm run test:integration && npm run test:modules && npm run test:loops
scripts.example:modules: node examples/exampleMathModule.mjs && node examples/exampleHashModule.mjs && node examples/examplePEScanner.mjs && node examples/exampleELFScanner.mjs
scripts.example:advanced: node examples/exampleBooleanLiterals.mjs && node examples/exampleConditionsMatch.mjs && node examples/exampleDependentRules.mjs && node examples/exampleCompleteIntegration.mjs && node examples/exampleFilesizeOperator.mjs

author: Rishi Kant
